roomGate.invited: You've been invited to a room

lobby.title: Lobby
lobby.subtitle: Pick a role and wait for the room master to start.
lobby.requireFullRegionHint: Players must own every tile in a region before building houses or properties there.
lobby.waitingForHost: Waiting for the host to start…

game.leaveConfirm: Leave the game? You'll forfeit your properties and can't rejoin.
game.pinjolDesc: Take a quick loan for cash now — repay it later with steep interest.
game.negotiateDesc: Propose a deal to another player: swap properties, trade cash, rent immunity, or revenue share.

debt.title: ⚠️ Debt due
debt.autoSettleHint: Raise the cash and it settles automatically — click one of your properties on the board to sell it, or take a pinjol.
debt.giveUpConfirm: Give up and be eliminated? Your properties return to the bank.

pinjol.title: 🏦 Pinjol — Take a loan
pinjol.terms: 10% interest/lap · max {{maxLoans}} loans · borrow up to {{limit}}

meta.title: Meta actions
meta.chooseBeforeRolling: Choose before rolling — skips your move

descriptions.invest: Buy an unowned property tile you pick on the board — your action this turn.
descriptions.work: Skip your move and collect your salary instead. Choose before rolling.
descriptions.hustle: Draw a Hustle card — a risky side gig with a random payoff.
descriptions.lobby: Pay to make a rival skip their next turn.
descriptions.sabotage: Pay to halve the rent a rival collects on a chosen tile for 2 rounds.
descriptions.korupsi: Gamble for a quick payout — 60% you steal from the bank, 40% you're jailed and fined.

ability.title: Role ability (once per game)
ability.viralBoostHint: 3× passive income for 3 rounds — once per game
ability.blockKejadianHint: Nullify the next National Event card — once per game

desc.property_swap: {{from}} offers their {{offer}} in exchange for your {{request}}.
desc.rent_immunity: {{from}} pays you {{cash}} for {{rounds}}-round rent immunity on your {{request}}.
desc.revenue_share_proposer: {{from}} will share {{percent}}% of their passive income with you for {{rounds}} rounds.
desc.revenue_share_target: You would share {{percent}}% of your passive income with {{from}} for {{rounds}} rounds.

voting.title: 🗳️ Vote to skip a turn
voting.instruction: The most-voted player skips their next turn. {{cast}}/{{eligible}} voted.

property.buildRentCut: Build on this tile — you earn a rent cut:
property.needFullRegion: You must own the whole region before building here.
property.sellConfirm: Sell {{name}} back to the bank for {{refund}}?

status.title: My status
status.noProperties: You don't own any properties yet.

investor.name: Investor
investor.ability: Earn 5% from every rent paid to others

kontraktor.name: Contractor
kontraktor.ability: Build on others' property for 30% cut

influencer.name: Influencer
influencer.ability: Once per game: viral boost 3× for 3 turns

pejabat.name: Official
pejabat.ability: Once per game: block any kejadian card

rentenir.name: Loan Shark
rentenir.ability: Force one player per round to take pinjol, earns the interest

sales.name: Sales
sales.ability: Buy property 25% cheaper + earn 15% bank bonus on initiated deals

banjir_jakarta.name: Jakarta Flood
banjir_jakarta.effect: All Jakarta tiles drop 1 tier for 3 rounds

mudik_season.name: Mudik Season
mudik_season.effect: All transport tiles earn 2× for 3 rounds

viral_medsos.name: Viral on Social Media
viral_medsos.effect: One random property earns 3× for 3 rounds

inspeksi_pajak.name: Tax Inspection
inspeksi_pajak.effect: Richest player pays 10% of their cash as fine

gempa_bumi.name: Earthquake
gempa_bumi.effect: One random region's tiles lose rent bonus for 2 rounds

demo_buruh.name: Labor Protest
demo_buruh.effect: Property track passive income halved for 2 rounds

boom_tambang.name: Mining Boom
boom_tambang.effect: Kalimantan + Papua tiles earn 2× for 3 rounds

musim_liburan.name: Holiday Season
musim_liburan.effect: Bali + Lombok tiles earn 2× for 3 rounds

korupsi_terungkap.name: Corruption Exposed
korupsi_terungkap.effect: Player with most pinjol loans pays Rp 3 juta fine

investasi_asing.name: Foreign Investment
investasi_asing.effect: All property track owners earn Rp 1 juta bonus

pemilu.name: Election
pemilu.effect: All players vote — most voted player skips next turn
